channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【VS Code 1.112 Insiders】VS Code 1.112 内部人员
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.112 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.112 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Evolving DirectX for the ML Era on Windows】Windows 上的 ML 时代的 DirectX 演进
item.description: 【At GDC this year, we shared how machine learning is becoming foundational to real time graphics, and how DirectX is evolving to meet that shift across shader level and model level ML. ML is no longer a niche optimization or a postprocess trick. It’s increasingly embedded throughout the graphics pipeline, influencing how frames are generated,】在今年的 GDC 上，我们分享了机器学习如何成为实时图形的基础，以及 DirectX 如何发展以满足着色器级别和模型级别 ML 的转变。机器学习不再是一种利基优化或后处理技巧。它越来越多地嵌入整个图形管道，影响帧的生成方式，

item.title: 【Microsoft at JavaOne: Empowering Java developers to lead the next era of AI】微软在 JavaOne：帮助 Java 开发者引领人工智能的下一个时代
item.description: 【Java has powered some of the world’s most mission‑critical systems for decades and that’s a big part of why we’re excited to be back with the community at JavaOne 2026 (March 17–19 in Redwood City). At Microsoft, we get to work with Java teams every day: folks shipping at massive scale, running on tight SLAs, modernizing mature codeb】几十年来，Java 一直为世界上一些最关键的任务系统提供支持，这也是我们很高兴能在 JavaOne 2026（3 月 17 日至 19 日在雷德伍德城）上与社区重聚的一个重要原因。在 Microsoft，我们每天都与 Java 团队合作：大规模交付、按照严格的 SLA 运行、对成熟的代码库进行现代化改造

item.title: 【Agent Harness in Agent Framework】Agent 框架中的 Agent Harness
item.description: 【Agent harness is the layer where model reasoning connects to real execution: shell and filesystem access, approval flows, and context management across long-running sessions. With Agent Framework, these patterns can now be built consistently in both Python and .NET. In this post, we’ll look at three practical building blocks for】代理利用是模型推理与实际执行相连接的层：shell 和文件系统访问、审批流程以及跨长时间运行会话的上下文管理。借助 Agent Framework，现在可以在 Python 和 .NET 中一致地构建这些模式。在这篇文章中，我们将介绍三个实用的构建模块

item.title: 【DirectX: Bringing Console-Level Developer Tools to Windows】DirectX：将控制台级开发人员工具引入 Windows
item.description: 【On March 12th, 2026, the DirectX team and our hardware partners hosted DirectX: Br】2026 年 3 月 12 日，DirectX 团队和我们的硬件合作伙伴主办了 DirectX：Br

item.title: 【Modernize .NET Anywhere with GitHub Copilot】使用 GitHub Copilot 实现 .NET Anywhere 现代化
item.description: 【Modernizing a .NET application is rarely a single step. It requires understanding the current state of the codebase, evaluating dependencies, identifying potential breaking changes, and sequencing updates carefully. Until recently, GitHub Copilot modernization for .NET ran primarily inside Visual Studio. That worked well for teams st】.NET 应用程序的现代化很少是一步完成的。它需要了解代码库的当前状态，评估依赖关系，识别潜在的重大更改，并仔细排序更新。直到最近，.NET 的 GitHub Copilot 现代化主要在 Visual Studio 内运行。这对团队来说效果很好

item.title: 【.NET 10.0.5 Out-of-Band Release - macOS Debugger Fix】.NET 10.0.5 带外版本 - macOS 调试器修复
item.description: 【We are releasing .NET 10.0.5 as an out-of-band (OOB) update to address a regression introduced in .NET 10.0.4. What's the issue? .NET 10.0.4 introduced a regression that causes the debugger to crash when debugging applications on macOS using Visual Studio Code. After installing .NET SDK 10.0.104 or 10.0.200, the debugger could crash】我们将 .NET 10.0.5 作为带外 (OOB) 更新发布，以解决 .NET 10.0.4 中引入的回归问题。有什么问题吗？ .NET 10.0.4 引入了一个回归，当使用 Visual Studio Code 在 macOS 上调试应用程序时，该回归会导致调试器崩溃。安装 .NET SDK 10.0.104 或 10.0.200 后，调试器可能会崩溃

item.title: 【Windows stack limit checking retrospective: x86-32, also known as i386】Windows 堆栈限制检查回顾：x86-32，也称为 i386
item.description: 【We start our survey of historical stack limit checking functions on Windows with the 80386 family of processors. This function has actually changed form over the years, so we'll start with the "original flavor". Originally, the _chkstk function was called by putting the desired number of bytes in the eax re】我们开始对 Windows 上 80386 系列处理器的历史堆栈限制检查功能进行调查。这个功能多年来实际上已经改变了形式，所以我们将从“原始风味”开始。最初，_chkstk 函数是通过将所需字节数放入 eax re 中来调用的。

item.title: 【Advanced Shader Delivery: What’s New at GDC 2026】高级着色器交付：GDC 2026 的新增功能
item.description: 【Today we announced the innovation we’re bringing in solving shader compilation for the ecosystem at our GDC Talk: Advanced Shader Delivery for Windows. Want to find out what this means for solving shader compilation for your title and customers? Read on! State of the Industry Long shader com】今天，我们在 GDC 演讲中宣布了为解决生态系统着色器编译问题而引入的创新：适用于 Windows 的高级着色器交付。想要了解这对于解决您的游戏和客户的着色器编译问题意味着什么？继续阅读！行业现状长着色器 com

item.title: 【Temporary rollback: build identities can access Advanced Security: read alerts again】临时回滚：构建身份可以访问高级安全性：再次读取警报
item.description: 【If you use build service identities like Project Collection Build Service to call Advanced Security APIs, the Advanced Security permission changes in Sprint 269 broke that】如果您使用诸如项目集合构建服务之类的构建服务身份来调用高级安全 API，则 Sprint 269 中的高级安全权限更改会打破这一点
